name: mega-navbar
title: Mega Navbar
author: Parable
description: A sticky, translucent top bar with an Apple-style mega-menu: hovering or keyboard-focusing a top item springs open a rich dropdown of link columns while a shared background pill glides between active items via a Motion layout animation. Collapses to a hamburger disclosure with an accordion on mobile; under prefers-reduced-motion the pill snaps instead of gliding and the sheet opens/closes instantly.
